calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-29-2003 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on calendar this day by assignment from the Dept. of Presiding Judge for Court Trial.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack CSR: Brenda Fields
Appearances:
Martin Deutsch, Esq., for Plaintiff. Marion Greenfield also present was sworn and examined.
No appearance by Defendant.
The court hears testimony and supporting evidence. Documentary evidence, cancelled checks, promissory notes, miscellaneous expenses, bank statements presented as offer of proof.
After hearing evidence presented, the court grants judgment in favor of the Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows:

Plaintiff is sole owner of the Title and Fee simple to the property located at:
18 Lydia Street, San Francisco, CA. Plaintiff waives claims, money damages and costs against the Defendant.
Defendant Linda R. Green field owns no right, title, estate interest or lien in the subject property at 18 Lydia St., SF.
Judgment to be prepared by counsel.
